channel.title: Pi Projects
channel.description: Hands-on Raspberry Pi projects with real measurements.

item.title: 200-Sqft Beginner Garden Dollar Yield: How $273 in Startup Costs Grew $513 of Produce
item.description: Crop-by-crop dollar breakdown of a 200-square-foot first-year vegetable garden versus supermarket prices, with real startup costs and failure scenarios.

item.title: DIY Laundry Detergent for a Year: We Saved 17 Dollars and Grated a Lot of Soap
item.description: A family-of-four cost breakdown of homemade powder detergent vs. store-bought, with honest numbers on when it's not worth the effort.

item.title: Home Composting Math: When a 60-Dollar Bin Starts Paying You Back
item.description: A $70 compost tumbler breaks even in 8 months for a family of four — here's the full two-year savings breakdown.

item.title: 10 Household Subscriptions That Quietly Cost 1,464 USD a Year (and the 60-Dollar Alternative Stack)
item.description: We tallied 10 common US family subscriptions, found free or self-hosted alternatives for each, and mapped the path from $122/month to $5.
